title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: A multi-model workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Opus for deployment. The approach leverages each model's strengths to produce beautiful frontends quickly by dividing tasks across providers.
